python sdk_async_errors.py
stdout 'SDK_ASYNC_ERRORS_OK'

-- sdk_async_errors.py --
import os

import httpx
from tinker import ServiceClient


base_url = os.environ["TINKER_BASE_URL"]
client = ServiceClient()
try:
    def post(path, req, status=400):
        resp = httpx.post(f"{base_url}{path}", json=req, timeout=5)
        assert resp.status_code == status, (path, resp.status_code, resp.text)
        return resp.json()

    body = post("/api/v1/create_model", {"base_model": "Qwen/Qwen3-8B"})
    assert body["code"] == "bad_request", body
    assert body["message"] == "missing session_id", body

    valid_input = {
        "loss_fn": "cross_entropy",
        "data": [
            {
                "model_input": {
                    "chunks": [{"type": "encoded_text", "tokens": [1]}],
                },
                "loss_fn_inputs": {
                    "target_tokens": {"data": [1], "dtype": "int64"},
                },
            }
        ],
    }
    body = post("/api/v1/forward", {"forward_input": valid_input})
    assert body["code"] == "bad_request", body
    assert body["message"] == "missing model_id", body

    body = post("/api/v1/optim_step", {"adam_params": {"learning_rate": 1e-4}})
    assert body["code"] == "bad_request", body
    assert body["message"] == "missing model_id", body

    resp = httpx.post(
        f"{base_url}/api/v1/save_weights",
        json={"model_id": "missing-model"},
        timeout=5,
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200, resp.text
    future = resp.json()
    body = post(
        "/api/v1/retrieve_future",
        {"request_id": future["request_id"]},
        status=200,
    )
    assert body["category"] == "user", body
    assert body["request_id"] == future["request_id"], body
    assert body["future_id"] == future["request_id"], body

    body = post(
        "/api/v1/asample",
        {
            "sampling_session_id": "sample-a",
            "num_samples": 1,
            "prompt": {"chunks": [{"tokens": []}]},
            "sampling_params": {},
        },
    )
    assert body["category"] == "user", body
    assert body["error"] == "prompt is empty", body

    body = post(
        "/api/v1/retrieve_future",
        {"request_id": "missing"},
        status=404,
    )
    assert body["status"] == "error", body
    assert body["code"] == "not_found", body

    print("SDK_ASYNC_ERRORS_OK")
finally:
    client.holder.close()
